reasons: The continuity layer now exports committed repo-native chat and wave artifacts from a single bundled continuity source.
The seeded chat markdown artifact and wave yaml/plan artifacts preserve the required naming conventions, links, and nh_id hierarchy.
The exporter provides deterministic --write and --check behavior, and the committed projections are current.
The operator chats and waves surfaces now distinguish bundled model preview, artifact path preview, and committed artifact presence.
Required gates passed, no API or DB mutation was added, no runtime or proof files changed, and no existing motion packages were modified.
No live automatic capture, execution, branch write, PR creation, dispatch, scheduler behavior, credential enablement, or cross-repo mutation capability was introduced.
